briefdescription.para: std::vector<T>-like container that requires specific indexing type,

parameterdescription.para: type of index (shall be convertible to size_t) Generated from class MR::Edges. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).

briefdescription.para: std::vector<T>-like container that requires specific indexing type,

parameterdescription.para: type of index (shall be convertible to size_t) Generated from class MR::Vector<MR::VertId, MR::EdgeId>. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).

detaileddescription.para: simplifies construction of connected polyline in the topology Generated from class MR::PolylineMaker. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).
Constructs an empty (default-constructed) instance. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_PolylineTopology_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Constructs an array of empty (default-constructed) instances, of the specified size. Will never return null. The array must be destroyed using MR_PolylineTopology_DestroyArray(). Use MR_PolylineTopology_OffsetMutablePtr() and MR_PolylineTopology_OffsetPtr() to access the array elements.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Generated from constructor MR::PolylineTopology::PolylineTopology. The reference to things referred to by the parameter _other (if any) might be preserved in the constructed object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_PolylineTopology_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

briefdescription.para: Destroys a heap-allocated instance of MR_PolylineTopology. Does nothing if the pointer is null.
Destroys a heap-allocated array of MR_PolylineTopology. Does nothing if the pointer is null.

detaileddescription.para: Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::operator=. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to things referred to by the parameter _other (if any) might be preserved in this object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it. When this function is called, this object will drop any object references it held previously.

build topology of comp2firstVert.size()-1 not-closed polylines each pair (a,b) of indices in
comp2firstVert
defines vertex range of a polyline [a,b) Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::buildOpenLines. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter comp2firstVert can not be null. It is a single object.
creates an edge not associated with any vertex Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::makeEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR_PolylineTopology *_this, MR_VertId a, MR_VertId b, const MR_EdgeId *e)
memberdef.name: MR_PolylineTopology_makeEdge_3

detaileddescription.para:
makes an edge connecting vertices a and b
e
if valid then the function does not make new edge, but connects the vertices using given one (and returns it)
if 1) any of the vertices is invalid or not within the vertSize(), 2) or a==b, 3) or either a or b already has 2 incident edges, 4) given edge e is not lone or not within the edgeSize() then makeEdge(a,b) does nothing and returns invalid edge Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::makeEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter e has a default argument: {}, pass a null pointer to use it.

for every given edge[ue] calls makeEdge( edge[ue][0], edge[ue][1], ue ), making new edges so that edges.size() <= undirectedEdgeSize() at the end
the total number of edges created Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::makeEdges. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter edges can not be null. It is a single object.

checks whether the edge is disconnected from all other edges and disassociated from all vertices (as if after makeEdge) Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::isLoneEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

returns last not lone undirected edge id, or invalid id if no such edge exists Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::lastNotLoneUndirectedEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns last not lone edge id, or invalid id if no such edge exists Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::lastNotLoneEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns the number of half-edge records including lone ones Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::edgeSize. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns the number of allocated edge records Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::edgeCapacity. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

returns the number of undirected edges (pairs of half-edges) including lone ones Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::undirectedEdgeSize. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns the number of allocated undirected edges (pairs of half-edges) Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::undirectedEdgeCapacity. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
computes the number of not-lone (valid) undirected edges Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::computeNotLoneUndirectedEdges. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
sets the capacity of half-edges vector Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::edgeReserve. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns true if given edge is within valid range and not-lone Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::hasEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

given edge becomes lone after the call, so it is un-spliced from connected edges, and if it was not connected at origin or destination, then that vertex is deleted as well Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::deleteEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

calls deleteEdge for every set bit Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::deleteEdges. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter es can not be null. It is a single object.
returns the amount of memory this object occupies on heap Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::heapBytes. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
the cut in rings in both cases is made after a and b Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::splice. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
next (counter clock wise) half-edge in the origin ring Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::next. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns origin vertex of half-edge Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::org. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns destination vertex of half-edge Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::dest. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
sets new origin to the full origin ring including this edge
edgePerVertex_ table is updated accordingly Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::setOrg. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

for all valid vertices this vector contains an edge with the origin there Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::edgePerVertex. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.

for all edges this vector contains its origin Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::getOrgs. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_Vector_MR_VertId_MR_EdgeId_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.
returns valid edge if given vertex is present in the mesh Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::edgeWithOrg. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns true if given vertex is present in the mesh Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::hasVert. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

returns 0 if given vertex does not exist, 1 if it has one incident edge, and 2 if it has two incident edges Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::getVertDegree. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns the number of valid vertices Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::numValidVerts. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns last valid vertex id, or invalid id if no single valid vertex exists Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::lastValidVert. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
creates new vert-id not associated with any edge yet Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::addVertId. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
explicitly increases the size of vertices vector Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::vertResize. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

explicitly increases the size of vertices vector, doubling the current capacity if it was not enough Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::vertResizeWithReserve. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
sets the capacity of vertices vector Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::vertReserve. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns the number of vertex records including invalid ones Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::vertSize. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns the number of allocated vert records Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::vertCapacity. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

returns cached set of all valid vertices Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::getValidVerts. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.

if region pointer is not null then converts it in reference, otherwise returns all valid vertices in the mesh Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::getVertIds. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.
finds and returns edge from o to d in the mesh; returns invalid edge otherwise Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::findEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

returns all vertices incident to path edges Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::getPathVertices. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter path can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_VertBitSet_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

split given edge on two parts: dest(returned-edge) = org(e) - newly created vertex, org(returned-edge) = org(e-before-split), dest(e) = dest(e-before-split) Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::splitEdge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

adds polyline in this topology passing progressively via vertices *[vs, vs+num); if vs[0] == vs[num-1] then a closed polyline is created; return the edge from first to second vertex Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::makePolyline. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR_PolylineTopology *_this, const MR_PolylineTopology *from, const MR_UndirectedEdgeBitSet *mask, MR_VertMap *outVmap, MR_EdgeMap *outEmap)
memberdef.name: MR_PolylineTopology_addPartByMask

detaileddescription.para: appends polyline topology (from) in addition to the current topology: creates new edges, verts; Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::addPartByMask. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter from can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter mask can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter outVmap defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter outEmap defaults to a null pointer in C++.

tightly packs all arrays eliminating lone edges and invalid vertices
outVmap outEmap
if given returns mappings: old.id -> new.id; Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::pack. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter outVmap defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter outEmap defaults to a null pointer in C++.
saves this in binary stream Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::write. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter s can not be null. It is a single object.
loads this from binary stream Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::read. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter s can not be null. It is a single object.

comparison via edges (all other members are considered as not important caches) Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::operator==. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter b can not be null. It is a single object.
Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::operator!=. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter b can not be null. It is a single object.

returns true if for each edge e: e == e.next() || e.odd() == next( e ).sym().odd() Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::isConsistentlyOriented. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
changes the orientation of all edges: every edge e is replaced with e.sym() Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::flip. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
verifies that all internal data structures are valid Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::checkValidity. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
computes numValidVerts_ and validVerts_ from edgePerVertex_ Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::computeValidsFromEdges. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
returns true if the polyline does not have any holes Generated from method MR::PolylineTopology::isClosed. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

Returns a pointer to a member variable of class MR::PolylineMaker named topology. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it. The reference to this object might be preserved as the return value.

Generated from constructor MR::PolylineMaker::PolylineMaker. Parameter _other can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to things referred to by the parameter _other (if any) might be preserved in the constructed object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_PolylineMaker_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Generated from constructor MR::PolylineMaker::PolylineMaker. Parameter t can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to the parameter t might be preserved in the constructed object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_PolylineMaker_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

briefdescription.para: Destroys a heap-allocated instance of MR_PolylineMaker. Does nothing if the pointer is null.
Destroys a heap-allocated array of MR_PolylineMaker. Does nothing if the pointer is null.

detaileddescription.para:
creates first edge of polyline
v
first vertex of the polyline Generated from method MR::PolylineMaker::start. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.

makes next edge of polyline
v
next vertex of the polyline Generated from method MR::PolylineMaker::proceed. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
closes the polyline Generated from method MR::PolylineMaker::close. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
finishes the polyline adding final vertex in it Generated from method MR::PolylineMaker::finishOpen. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
